title: evolvulus incanus
intro: Evolvulus incanus, also known as hairy dwarf bluecurls, is a type of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Evolvulus incanus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat wounds and infections. Evolvulus incanus is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in the form of a topical cream or ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
